series_metadata.series_description: Specific Pick-a-Post (work area agreements for the Developmental Centers). MOUs can be for anything not covered in the contract that the parties want to agree on (i.e. travel, established term irregular appointment).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for two years after expiration of MOU or until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for two years after expiration of MOU., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
